title: 30 km Long Run with Fueling Practice

sections.markdown:
- 30 km long run with fueling practice
- Settle around `6:00 /km` and keep the effort aerobic rather than turning this into a disguised progression run.
- Start fueling early and practise the intake pattern you want for the marathon block.
- Skip basketball. The point of the day is durable long-run volume, not stacking extra hard load.
